@graph.description: GST Services in Goa. From ₹2,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. GST registration, monthly/quarterly return filing, GST audit. Contact +91 99622 60333.

acceptedAnswer.text: When turnover exceeds ₹40 lakhs (goods) or ₹20 lakhs (services). Also mandatory for e-commerce sellers, inter-state suppliers, and casual taxable persons.

mainEntity.name: What is the penalty for late GST filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: ₹50/day (₹25 CGST + ₹25 SGST) for nil returns, ₹100/day for regular returns, subject to maximum of ₹5,000 per return.

mainEntity.name: Can you help with GST show cause notices?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle DRC-01 replies, Section 73/74 proceedings, and Section 107 appeals. AI-assisted order analysis within 24 hours.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide gst services services in Goa?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Goa from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Goa?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Goa fall under ROC Mumbai (Goa). Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Goa-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Goa?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Goa: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
